steps.title: Set up the unit conversion
steps.content: We need to convert 24,816 yards per hour to miles per hour. Given that 1 mile = 1,760 yards, we divide the speed in yards by 1,760 to get the speed in miles.

steps.title: Calculate the speed in miles per hour
steps.content:
$$\frac{24,816}{1,760} = 14.1$$

The average speed is 14.1 miles per hour.
